info.title: UpWoof API
info.description:
Just an API for pet hotels.

Use of the API requires an API key. Your key can be obtained from your account page. Once you have your API key click the Authorize button and enter your key to unlock the API for testing.

get.description: Return a list of accommodation types

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The direction to order the records by. Must be either ascending (asc) or descending (desc).

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: The field to order the records by.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The current page of records to return.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of records per page to return.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of accommodation types

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the accommodation type

get.description: Return a list of CMS apps

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The direction to order the records by. Must be either ascending (asc) or descending (desc).

parameters.name: order_by
parameters.description: The field to order the records by.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The current page of records to return.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: The number of records per page to return.

200.description: Successfully retrieved the list of CMS apps

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the CMS app

listing_type_id.description: ID of the associated listing type

name.description: Name of the accommodation type (e.g., Deluxe Suite, Standard Kennel)

day_of_the_week.description: Opening hour's day of the week

created_at.description: Day of the week's creation timestamp

id.description: Day of the week's unique id

sort_order.description: Day of the week's sort order

updated_at.description: Day of the week's last update timestamp

listing_id.description: ID of the listing this accommodation belongs to

accommodation_type_id.description: Updated ID of the accommodation type
Updated ID of the accommodation type

name.description: Name of the animal type (e.g., Bird, Reptile)

animal_type_id.description: ID of the animal type this breed belongs to

total_discount_amount_cents.description: Credit note's total discount amount in cents

total_tax_amount_cents.description: Credit note's total tax amount in cents

voided_at.description: When the credit note was voided

amount_cents.description: Credit note's line item's amount in cents

amount_excluding_tax_cents.description: Credit note's line item's amount excluding tax in cents

created_at.description: Credit note line item's creation timestamp

id.description: Credit note line item's unique id

invoice_line_item.description: Credit note line item's invoice line item

unit_amount_cents.description: Credit note's line item's unit amount in cents

updated_at.description: Credit note line item's last update timestamp

amount_cents.description: Invoice's line item's amount in cents

amount_excluding_tax_cents.description: Invoice's line item's amount excluding tax in cents

unit_amount_cents.description: Invoice's line item's unit amount in cents

updated_at.description: Invoice line item's last update timestamp

marked_uncollectible_at.description: When the invoice was marked uncollectible

uw_fee_amount_cents.description: Invoice's UpWoof fee amount in cents
Order's UpWoof fee amount in cents

price_cents.description: Order's line item's price in cents

unit_price_cents.description: Order's line item's unit price in cents

updated_at.description: Order line item's last update timestamp

invoice_id.description: ID of the invoice to credit

invoice_line_item_id.description: ID of the original invoice line item

currency.description: ISO currency code (3 letters, e.g., USD, GBP)

customer_id.description: ID of the customer being invoiced

due_date.description: Date when the invoice is due

currency.description: ISO currency code for the listing

listing_type_ids.description: IDs of the types for this listing

customer_id.description: ID of the customer placing the order

animal_type_id.description: ID of the animal type (e.g., Dog, Cat)

customer_id.description: ID of the customer who owns the pet

animal_type_id.description: Updated ID of the animal type
Updated ID of the animal type

customer_id.description: ID of the customer making the reservation

listing_id.description: ID of the listing where the reservation is made

pet_id.description: ID of the pet being reserved

when_reservation_finish.description: End date and time of the reservation

when_reservation_start.description: Start date and time of the reservation
